subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Feb. 1920
subcodes.first_line: In this journey ye have endured manifold hardships. At this time, by reason of the universal conflagration, travel hath become most arduous and difficult [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در این مسافرت بسیار زحمت کشیدید . این اوقات بواسطه حرب عمومی مسافرت بسیار صعب و مشگل
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @Shrines and Holy places, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
